summary: Accepted M7 performance, memory, and loading validation after QA R2 ACCEPT. R2 evidence now uses the M7 Beta-scale artifact sampleSize=36 across 3 scenarios and 12 seeds, records RSS/heap memory, save/load timing, Web startup/loading and map/UI density proxy, desktop security/package smoke, and artifact tree hashes. The task is accepted with PASS_WITH_LIMITS for unfrozen M7 numeric thresholds and low-end Windows proxy evidence, not signed release readiness.

tests_run.result: Task registry listed; M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 is REVIEW before lead accept.
M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 is next dependency-ready task while this task is active.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task, R2 writer handoff, QA R2 handoff, and R2 evidence
tests_run.result: LEAD_JSON_SHAPE_OK; R2 evidence sampleSize=36 and threshold=PASS_WITH_LIMITS.
Passed; SIM-005 supporting baseline dayThroughputPerSecond=8513, p95=241700ns, p99=443500ns.
Passed; Node and worker-compatible hashes matched through M6 Alpha.
Passed; Vite build completed with existing >500k chunk warnings.
Passed; Storybook build completed with existing plugin timing and chunk warnings.
Passed; security preferences, preload bridge, renderer navigation restriction, and IPC allowlist verified.
Passed; architecture, determinism, root 43 files/353 tests, web 1 file/9 tests.

decisions: Accept QA R2 status=ACCEPT and advance task to ACCEPTED pending PR CI and main integration.
Record R2 performance evidence as PASS_WITH_LIMITS because task metadata does not freeze numeric M7 thresholds.
Record low-end Windows evidence as proxy only; no claim of true low-end hardware validation or signed release readiness.

Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, arbitrary-code mod, commercial/release/branding, frozen architecture, or irreversible migration change is introduced.
risks: True low-end Windows hardware validation remains future matrix evidence; this task records a proxy assumption only.
Desktop security/package commands share output trees and should remain serialized.

R2 artifact file paths in the evidence omit the asset directory prefix for bundled assets, but QA verified hashes with fallback roots and stable tree hashes; future evidence scripts should improve path clarity.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 after origin/main contains the accepted changes.
